items.title: Migration adds model + cli_session_id to sessions
items.expected: Migration 0005_session_model applies; sessions has nullable model and cli_session_id columns.

items.title: Slash commands are interpreted over stream-json stdin
steps: 1. Pipe a stream-json user message whose text is `/context` into `claude -p --output-format stream-json --input-format stream-json`.
items.expected: `/context` returns the context report; `/compact` is handled as a command (not echoed as plain text).
items.evidence: Probe during planning: /context returned 'Tokens: 64k / 1m (6%)'; /compact returned 'Not enough messages to compact.'
items.notes: Confirms the /compact button and /-skill sends work over the wrapper's stdin.

items.title: OAuth usage endpoint returns 5h + weekly windows
items.precondition: Claude subscription OAuth token present in the macOS keychain.
steps: 1. ClaudeUsageService.getLimits() (or curl the endpoint with the keychain token).
items.expected: Returns five_hour and seven_day with utilization + resets_at; HTTP 200.
items.evidence: Verified live during planning: HTTP 200, five_hour util 47%, seven_day util 20%.

items.title: GET /api/usage/limits returns the envelope without the token
items.expected: { success:true, data:{ limits:{ available, fiveHour, sevenDay, fetchedAt } } } — no token field anywhere.

items.title: Sidebar usage ring shows live 5h + weekly and reset times
items.precondition: App open on the Sessions panel.
steps: 1. Observe the ring at the top of the sidebar.
2. Click it to open the dropdown.
items.expected: Two concentric arcs reflect utilization; dropdown shows each window's percent + 'resets in …'. Renders '—' if the endpoint is unavailable.

items.title: Context ring rises as the session fills its window
items.precondition: An active session with a few turns.
steps: 1. Send turns and watch the ring to the right of Send.
items.expected: The ring fills toward 100% as context tokens grow; tooltip shows tokens / window.

items.title: Switching model mid-chat preserves conversation context
items.precondition: An active session with at least one prior turn (e.g. ask it to remember a number).
steps: 1. Open the model picker, choose a different model.
2. After the process restarts, ask a question that depends on the earlier turn.
items.expected: The model label updates to the new model; the answer shows the earlier context was retained (resume worked).
items.notes: Picker is disabled while streaming; backend rejects a switch mid-turn (SESSION_BUSY).

items.title: Skill autocomplete and /-prefixed send
items.precondition: An active session whose init reported slash commands.
steps: 1. Type `/` then a few letters; pick a suggestion.
2. Send a `/deep-research …` style message without a workflow command.
items.expected: Autocomplete lists the session's real skills; the /-message sends (bypasses the workflow-command gate).

items.title: /compact button compacts the conversation
items.precondition: An active session with enough messages to compact.
items.expected: Claude compacts the context (on a near-empty session it reports 'Not enough messages to compact').
items.notes: CLI-level behavior already confirmed by T2-probe.

items.title: OAuth token never leaks to client or logs
items.precondition: App running with usage polling active.
steps: 2. Grep server logs for the token.
items.expected: No access token in any response payload or log line.
items.evidence: By design: token confined to ClaudeUsageService; only utilization/reset are returned. Needs a runtime check to confirm.
